text:
M1040 Influenza Received in Agency This field indicates if the patient received the influenza vaccine during this episode of care in agency. 00 = No
01 = Yes
NA = Does not apply because entire episode of care (SOC/ROC to
Transfer/Discharge) is outside this influenza season. CHAR 2 x
M1045_INFLNZ_RSN_NOT_RCVD M1045 Influenza Vaccine- Reason not Received This field indicates the reason why the influenza vaccine was not received from the agency during this episode of
care. 01 = Received from
